{"description":"Use CircleCI (house default across the letterbox fleet; GH Actions only on the 2 newest repos, gauge + sortingoffice). Base on letterbox-scoring/.circleci/config.yml but trim to a single 'build' job for this repo's current scope:
- image: sbtscala/scala-sbt:eclipse-temurin-* matching sbt 1.10.7 / Scala 3.5.2 (their pin is 1.10.11/3.3.6)
- restore/save sbt cache keyed on build.sbt + .circleci/config.yml + project/build.properties + project/plugins.sbt (paths ~/.m2 ~/.ivy2/cache ~/.sbt)
- steps: checkout; run 'make check' via 'cat /dev/null | sbt scalafmtCheckAll test'; store_test_results from target/test-reports
- slack/notify on fail (optional, needs slack-secrets context)
Do NOT copy their test-integration/test-contracts jobs (no such tests here yet - see bad_usernames_api-0u3) or build-image/publish-image GCR jobs (belongs with Dockerfile bead bad_usernames_api-7he). Reference: gh api repos/flurdy/letterbox-scoring/contents/.circleci/config.yml
","title":"Add CircleCI CI workflow"}
old_value: {"id":"bad_usernames_api-au3","title":"Add GitHub Actions CI workflow","description":"No CI yet. Add .github/workflows that runs 'make check' (scalafmt check + sbt test) on push/PR against main. Gives 'make ci' something honest to point at and enables PR status gating.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"ivarabrahamsen@bluelightcard.co.uk","created_at":"2026-07-03T12:25:37Z","created_by":"Ivar Abrahamsen","updated_at":"2026-07-03T12:25:37Z","labels":["ci","milestone-1"]}

{"id":"bad_usernames_api-0u3","title":"Add route-level HTTP tests for API endpoints","description":"Only UsernameChecker pure logic is covered. Add http4s route tests for GET /api/v1/check/{username} (hit + miss + empty-\u003e400), POST /api/v1/check (batch, over-limit-\u003e400, empty value-\u003e400, malformed JSON-\u003e400), GET /api/v1/meta, and 404 for unknown routes. Covers happy/sad/edge paths per verify conventions.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"ivarabrahamsen@bluelightcard.co.uk","created_at":"2026-07-03T12:25:37Z","created_by":"Ivar Abrahamsen","updated_at":"2026-07-03T12:25:37Z","labels":["milestone-1","testing"]}

new_value: Added RoutesSuite covering all endpoints (happy/sad/edge) + fixed POST /check to return JSON 400 on malformed body. 13 tests green.
